title: DBMS Connectors on a Network
text: DBMS Connectors on a Network Uniface supports multiple DBMS connectors and multiple network connections. Uniface applications can connect to the DBMS connector directly or remotely. Normally, remote database access is handled by a Uniface Router and Uniface Server on a remote machine that is accessible via a Uniface network connector. In this case, the DBMS connector is located on the same machine as the Uniface Server. Figure 1. Connectors in a Uniface Application and Application Server Configuration However, it is also possible to use a network product provided by the DBMS. In this case, the DBMS connector and the Uniface application reside on the same machine. Figure 2. Example of Uniface Interaction with the Networking Facility of the DBMS Was this topic helpful?
